models.name: sglang
models.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.

models.name: inspect_ai
models.description: Inspect: A framework for large language model evaluations

models.name: jiuwenclaw
models.description: JiuwenClaw is an intelligent AI Agent built on openJiuwen. It extends the powerful capabilities of large language models directly to your fingertips through various communication apps you use daily.

models.name: NewAdversarialAttackPaper
models.description: A list of recent adversarial attack and defense papers (including those on large language models)

models.name: NewsPilot
models.description: NewsPilot is an automated intelligence analysis system based on Large Language Models (LLM), designed to transform massive global news into personalized, actionable insights. It is not just a news aggregation tool, but a 24/7 intelligent intelligence assistant that understands your profession, holdings, and interests.

models.name: open-chat-studio
models.description: A web based platform for building Chatbots backed by Large Language Models

models.name: epstein-ranker
models.description: LLM-powered tooling for triaging the U.S. House Oversight & DOJ Epstein document release.

models.name: FlexAC
models.description: Official implementation for the NeurIPS 2025 paper: "FlexAC: Towards Flexible Control of Associative Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models". A lightweight, training-free framework for modulating associative behavior in MLLMs.

models.name: fsm_llm
models.description: A Finite State Machine hybrid with Large Language Models

models.name: mcp-github-pr-issue-analyser
models.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) application for automated GitHub PR analysis and issue management. Enables LLMs to fetch PR details, analyse diffs, manage issues, and handle releases through a standardised interface

models.name: synapz
models.description: synapz is a research prototype exploring how large language models can adapt teaching content to different cognitive styles. built over a 48-hour sprint with a strict $50 api budget, this project implements a scientific framework to test whether adaptive teaching produces measurably better results than static approaches.

models.name: ml-sobench
models.description: SO-Bench release for evaluating visual structured output capabilities of multimodal LLMs.

models.name: Auto-Pentest-LLM
models.description: 🔍 Automate penetration testing with an intelligent agent that organizes security assessments, leveraging local LLMs and Kali Linux for effective exploitation.

models.name: core58-w2a8-msvc
models.description: Windows-native BitNet and ternary LLM inference with CPU GGUF, GPU runtime, terminal and browser chat, and release zips.

models.name: Yelp-Offline-Recommendation-Pipeline
models.description: Offline Yelp recommender for Louisiana restaurant discovery, with candidate fusion, XGBoost rerank, QLoRA/DPO sidecar experiments, and release validation.

models.name: Source-Code-Security-Audit-Reviewer
models.description: intelligent auditing tool powered by large language models, supporting GPT, . It automatically detects security vulnerabilities, performance issues

models.name: EchoLogic
models.description: EchoLogic is an AI-driven voice-to-documentation pipeline that helps teams capture the essence of meetings, discussions, or podcasts, and turn them into insightful documents and flow-based visualizations. Inspired by the power of human communication and backed by large language models (LLMs), EchoLogic listens, understands, and organizes.

models.name: ai-landscape-digest
models.description: Your local AI release feed, summarized immediately on computer login — powered by whatever LLM CLI you already have.

models.name: ReleaseNotesRec-Agent
models.description: An AI-powered Release Notes & Feedback Analysis Agent built using LangChain, ChromaDB, and LLMs. It collects release notes, Reddit feedback, and real-world user issues, performs sentiment/topic analysis, and delivers accurate insights through a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) workflow.

models.name: social-attention-monitor
models.description: SAM — Social Attention Monitor. A  pipeline for tracking social attention dynamics and sentiment around media releases

models.name: kiln
models.description: Local-first LLM release gate for open-source model builders

models.name: Newmind-master
models.description: Developing a large language model entirely of one's own creation

models.name: memfuse
models.description: MemFuse offers a robust memory layer for large language models, enhancing their performance and efficiency. Join our community on GitHub to explore features, report issues, or request new functionalities! 🐙💻

models.name: Minerva
models.description: Minerva is an experimental, privacy-first, Python-based AI assistant. It leverages local Large Language Models (LLMs) to converse, learn, and dynamically adapt to the user over time—all while keeping your data strictly on your own device. It is currently in heavy development and not ready for production use. Contributions welcome!

models.name: FER-Chat
models.description: A multimodal interactive desktop application integrating computer vision, speech recognition, large language model and speech synthesis

models.name: pl-llm-errors
models.description: This repository contains the source code and datasets for experiments conducted as part of the Master's thesis titled: "Analysis of the impact of errors in Polish-language queries on the quality of responses from large language models". The objective of the project is to investigate the robustness of various models against Polish-specific errors.

models.name: CloudComputingGroupproject
models.description: cloud-deployed Telegram chatbot powered by a large language model

models.name: AI-Powered-Research-Paper-Summarizer-Insight-Extractor-
models.description: This repository provides an AI-driven tool to digest complex research papers and extract key insights instantly. It offers a seamless bridge between modern web interfaces and high-speed Large Language Models.

models.name: Callisia-WearLM
models.description: Combining traditional Machine Learning and Large Language Models for Healthcare: A Hybrid Approach for Interpreting Wearable Data

models.name: QuizFromPDF
models.description: An AI-powered application that automatically generates multiple-choice quizzes from PDF documents using NLP, machine learning, and large language models for students.

models.name: build-LLM-from-scratch
models.description: Tracking my progress with the book "Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch)"

models.name: OnePersonCompany
models.description: Transform daily progress into structured reports, release notes, and shareable content to simplify solo or small team project management.

models.name: language-neutral-or-language-specific
models.description: Paper-complete release for multilingual LLM shared-vs-specific naturalistic fMRI analyses in LPPC.

models.name: HowHungryisAIRepo
models.description: This repository powers the “How Hungry is AI?” dashboard and provides the code + data release accompanying our paper on inference-phase (operational) environmental footprints of LLMs.

models.name: release-notes-assistant
models.description: An intelligent Streamlit assistant that automates the generation of professional, publication-ready release notes from Jira CSV exports using a customizable AI-powered workflow.

models.name: ai-qa-framework
models.description: Requirements-driven AI-QA governance framework with traceability, release gates, audit reporting, and multi-provider evaluation

models.name: clawroute
models.description: Intelligent routing & traffic orchestration engine for OpenClaw — A/B testing, canary releases, multi-provider failover, traffic replay

models.name: community-release-llm-integration
models.description: AI tasks that interact with LLMs and MCP servers

models.name: RepoLens_AI
models.description: Grounded engineering assistant for repo Q&A, release review, repo-state comparison, eval regressions, and exportable review reports.

models.name: AI-News-Newsletter-Assistant
models.description: Aggregate and summarize AI news from RSS feeds using multithreading and large language models, delivering formatted newsletters to your email automatically.

models.name: news-summarizer-ai
models.description: An automated news intelligence tool that aggregates real-time data and utilizes Large Language Models (LLMs) to provide concise, 3-bullet point technical summaries on user-defined topics.

models.name: FakeNewsMuRIL
models.description: Multilingual Fake News Detection using MuRIL Transformer Model for Indian Languages

models.name: VoxelForge-
models.description: Voxel Forge is a new technology developed by Abu Halawa Industries. It converts images into 3D models using state-of-the-art methods and includes a VF language studio specifically designed for working with these models. This application is available to everyone free of charge; however, this is the initial version.

models.name: FAKE-NEWS-VERIFICATION-TOOL
models.description: The Fake News Detection & Verification Tool aims to combat misinformation by leveraging  Natural Language Processing (NLP), deep learning models, and real-time fact-checking  APIs. The system will analyze textual content, assess its credibility, and cross-reference facts with  reliable sources.

models.name: Engram
models.description: Conditional Memory via Scalable Lookup: A New Axis of Sparsity for Large Language Models

models.name: news-headline-gen
models.description: Large Language Models Course Project | News Headline Generation

models.name: cross-lingual-fake-news-detection
models.description: This project detects fake news across multiple languages using cross-lingual NLP and multilingual transformer models, enabling shared semantic understanding and effective misinformation detection in multilingual and low-resource language environments.

models.name: fake-News
models.description: This project focuses on building a machine learning model to automatically detect fake news articles using natural language processing (NLP) techniques. With the rapid growth of online media and social platforms, misinformation spreads quickly, making automated fake news detection an important application of data science.

models.name: llm-newsai-dashboard
models.description: NewsAI is an AI-powered real-time news intelligence dashboard that fetches news from RSS feeds, summarizes articles using Large Language Models (LLMs), performs sentiment analysis, and provides an AI chatbot with vector search and retrieval-augmented generation.

models.name: Fake-News-Detection-System
models.description: Fake News Detection App is a machine learning based web application that detects whether a news article or headline is Fake or Real. The system uses Natural Language Processing (NLP) and a trained machine learning model to analyze the text of the news and classify it accordingly.

models.name: AI_News_Intelligence_Platform
models.description: An AI-powered news intelligence platform for semantic search, RAG-based question answering, summarization, personalized recommendations, and agentic tool using large language models.

models.name: Fake-new-detection
models.description: This project focuses on detecting fake news articles using machine learning techniques and natural language processing (NLP). The system analyzes news text and classifies whether the information is real or fake based on linguistic patterns and trained models.
